description_long: A rustic wooden crate is filled to the brim with deep red apples, each apple displaying a smooth, slightly glossy skin and subtle natural dimples. The crate is constructed from medium-toned wood planks, reinforced at the corners with metal bolts and featuring a distinctive 'X' bracing on two sides. The apples are round, with some visible stems, and are tightly packed, giving a sense of abundance. The wood grain and minor imperfections in the crate add to its authentic, utilitarian appearance, suggesting it is used for transporting or displaying fresh produce. The apples themselves are uniform in color, with no visible blemishes or stickers, and their rich red hue contrasts with the earthy brown of the crate. This object would be commonly found in urban markets, grocery stores, or street vendor setups.
description: A wooden crate filled with smooth, deep red apples, tightly packed and visually fresh.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crate's 'X' bracing and a dense cluster of red apples.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain wooden panel and the tops of the apples inside.
description_view_2: Opposite end view mirrors the front, with 'X' bracing and visible apple tops.
description_view_3: Other side view displays a plain wooden panel and a full view of the apples' tops.
